[20/03/2026 19:08:14] ERRO CRÍTICO na main: Executable doesn't exist at /tmp/_MEI6gsWqC/playwright/driver/package/.local-browsers/chromium-1105/chrome-linux/chrome
╔════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════╗
║ Looks like Playwright was just installed or updated.       ║

║                                                            ║
║     playwright install                                     ║
